CALL_SECTION_TEXT: Have you been partying until late, and you're in the car and need to get home? Enjoy the evening without worries. Call us and we will take you home with your car quickly, discreetly and safely!
FOOTER_ABOUT_TITLE: Pro Drink and Drive - About us
FOOTER_ABOUT_TEXT: We have set ourselves the goal of making the city and its roads safer for ourselves, for our loved ones, for the people we love and who love us! We do not tolerate drunk driving! For us this is not just a job, but a mission!
OUR_DRIVERS_DESCRIPTION: Our drivers are licensed and experienced professionals who guarantee safe and discreet transportation. We work 24/7 by prior arrangement to get you home or to your desired destination quickly and without fines or a suspended license.
PRICING_ESTIMATION_NOTE: *Prices are calculated by the driver according to the odometer in the car.
